events.title: Orbital watch established
events.message: coke-zero has a baseline pass and a synthetic non-cooperative object inside the monitoring shell.

events.title: Coordinated RF, cyber, PNT, and drone anomaly
events.message: RF interference, gateway probing, GNSS bias, and UAS identity mismatch are occurring inside one operational window.

events.title: Convergence assessment raised
events.message: coke-zero assesses the anomaly cluster as a likely coordinated interference campaign and recommends protecting SATCOM while tracking RPO risk.

events.title: Request space-effect review
events.message: SATCOM degradation correlates with a synthetic RPO close-approach inject. Recommend commander approval to route a higher-authority space-effect request.

recommendation.summary: Draft request to preserve brigade BLOS during RPO close-approach window.
